revision.comment: 曖昧さ回避作成。
revision.text:
'''神嘉殿'''（しんかでん） # [[平安京]][[大内裏]]（平安宮）の中和院正殿。⇒「[[中和院]]」参照。 # 1を踏襲して、皇居の宮中三殿に付属して設けられた殿舎。⇒「[[宮中三殿]]」参照。
{{aimai}}

revision.comment: Created page with "'''Shinkaden''' (神嘉殿) # The main hall of the {{ill|Nakawake|ja|中和院}} within the {{ill|Daijō-kan|ja|大内裏}} of {{ill|Heian-kyō|ja|平安京}}. See {{ill|Nakawake|ja|中和院}} for details. # A hall established in the {{ill|Kyūchū Sanden|ja|宮中三殿}}, modeled after the first definition. See {{ill|Kyūchū Sanden|ja|宮中三殿}} for details. {{Aimai}} [[Category:Heian period architecture]] [[Category:Imperial Household of Japan]] ..."
doing another replacement of the same form to get the straggler pages I made
fixing the error I made with the apostrophe in the categories. Also fixing ills that were set to |en| instead of |ja| for some reason
adding original pages to the ones I made
replacing with the real template after a mistranslation
Immanuelle moved page [[Of the Shinkaden Hall]] to [[Shinkaden Hall]]
Adding [[Category:new pages]][[category:original pages]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
